project.name: Musa.Runtime
project.description: A Microsoft MSVC runtime library adapted for Windows kernel-mode development. Uses Docker-inspired overlay mechanism to selectively replace MSVC SDK source files, giving kernel developers the same C++ experience as application developers.

nodes.name: EnableX86AndARM.ps1
nodes.summary: PowerShell script that patches WindowsDriver.common.targets to remove architecture validation errors, enabling x86 and ARM platform support for kernel-mode builds.

nodes.name: InitializeVisualStudioEnvironment.cmd
nodes.summary: Initializes the Visual Studio command-line environment by locating the latest VS installation via vswhere and calling vcvarsall.bat for x64.

nodes.name: Musa.Runtime.Config.props
nodes.summary: MSBuild property sheet defining the Visual C++ library paths, platform-specific toolchain overrides, and build configuration defaults for the Musa.Runtime NuGet package.
nodes.languageNotes: Multi-target MSBuild props with conditionals for x86/x64/ARM64 Debug/Release configurations.

nodes.name: Musa.Runtime.Config.targets
nodes.summary: MSBuild targets file for the Musa.Runtime NuGet package that imports VisualC and UCRT library dependencies.

nodes.name: Musa.Runtime.nuspec
nodes.summary: NuGet package manifest for Musa.Runtime defining package metadata, dependencies on Musa.Core, and the file layout for native build consumption.

nodes.name: Musa.Runtime.props
nodes.summary: Minimal MSBuild property sheet imported by the NuGet package to signal the build system that the publishing step has access to NativeLibCopy items.

nodes.name: Musa.Runtime.slnx
nodes.summary: Solution file in the new .slnx XML format referencing the Musa.Runtime.TestForDriver driver project for building and testing.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses the new .slnx XML solution format replacing the legacy .sln format.

nodes.name: Musa.Runtime.TestForDriver.inf
nodes.summary: Driver package INF file for installing Musa.Runtime.TestForDriver.sys as a legacy kernel driver with service install and uninstall support.

nodes.name: Musa.Runtime.TestForDriver.vcxproj
nodes.summary: MSBuild project file for building the Musa.Runtime.TestForDriver WDM kernel driver, referencing the INF, precompiled header, and test source files.

nodes.name: Musa.Runtime.TestForDriver.vcxproj.filters
nodes.summary: Visual Studio filter file organizing the test driver source and header files into logical folders.

nodes.name: Test.h
nodes.summary: Test framework header defining logging macros (MusaLOG) and assertion macros (KTEST_EXPECT, KTEST, ASSERT variants) for kernel-mode test execution.

nodes.name: TestForDriver.Main.cpp
nodes.summary: Main test driver source containing 1600+ lines of comprehensive CRT/STL tests including heap allocation, string manipulation, locale, math, file I/O, and wide-character functions.

nodes.name: TestForDriver.Main.locale_tests.txt
nodes.summary: Documentation of locale-related test cases covering setlocale, localeconv, mbstowcs, wcstombs, collation, and character classification across various locale configurations.

nodes.name: Universal.cpp
nodes.summary: Empty source file serving as the precompiled header (PCH) compilation unit for the test driver project.

nodes.name: Universal.h
nodes.summary: Precompiled header include file that pulls in Veil.h and Test.h with common Windows macros defined (NOMINMAX, _CRT_SECURE_NO_WARNINGS).

nodes.name: Build.InitializeEnvironment.bat
nodes.summary: Batch script to locate the latest Visual Studio installation via vswhere and initialize the build environment for a given architecture.

nodes.name: Build.Microsoft.VisualC.Library.bat
nodes.summary: Batch build script for Microsoft Visual C++ static libraries with argument parsing, caching, optional spectre mitigations, and obj-file exclusion support.
nodes.languageNotes: Batch script with label-based subroutine dispatch and argument parsing via for-loop + call pattern.

nodes.name: Directory.Build.props
nodes.summary: MSBuild Directory.Build.props that forces import of Musa.Runtime.props after Cpp props, enabling custom C++ build configuration for the Musa.Runtime library.

nodes.name: delete_km.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements kernel-mode operator delete and operator delete[] with pool type and tag, delegating to kfree for memory release.

nodes.name: kallocator.h
nodes.summary: STL-compatible kernel-mode allocator template (kallocator<T, Pool, Tag>) parameterized by pool type and allocation tag, providing allocate/deallocate/construct/destroy for use with standard containers.
nodes.languageNotes: STL allocator adapter pattern with pool-type and tag template parameters for kernel-mode memory tracking.

nodes.name: kfree.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements the kfree function that releases kernel pool memory via ExFreePoolWithTag with null-pointer safety.

nodes.name: kmalloc.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements kernel-mode memory allocation functions (kmalloc, kcalloc, krealloc, krecalloc, ExReallocatePoolWithTag) using ExAllocatePoolWithTag and new-handler retry logic.

nodes.name: kmalloc.h
nodes.summary: Public header declaring the kernel-mode allocation API surface: kmalloc, kfree, kcalloc, krealloc, and krecalloc with pool type and tag parameters.

nodes.name: knew.h
nodes.summary: Public header declaring user-defined operator new and operator delete overloads for kernel-mode with pool type and tag parameters.

nodes.name: new_km.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements kernel-mode operator new and operator new[] that allocate via kmalloc with retry through the new handler and throw bad_alloc on failure.

nodes.name: thread_local.h
nodes.summary: Provides a kernel-mode thread_local_storage wrapper template using TlsAlloc/TlsGetValue/TlsSetValue/TlsFree, with a macro to replace the standard thread_local keyword.

nodes.name: guard_dispatch.asm
nodes.summary: ARM64 Control Flow Guard dispatch stub for _guard_dispatch_icall_nop.

nodes.name: handler.asm
nodes.summary: ARM64 exception handler stubs for __C_ExecuteExceptionFilter and __C_ExecuteTerminationHandler.

nodes.name: notify.asm
nodes.summary: ARM64 NLG (non-local goto) notification and dispatch routines for exception handling.

nodes.name: ftol.asm
nodes.summary: i386 _ftol conversion: truncates x87 FPU TOS to a 32-bit integer with chop rounding.

nodes.name: ftol2.asm
nodes.summary: i386 assembly float/double/integer conversion routines for CRT math support.

nodes.name: ftol2fast.asm
nodes.summary: i386 assembly float/double/integer conversion routines for CRT math support.

nodes.name: ftol2sat.asm
nodes.summary: i386 assembly float/double/integer conversion routines for CRT math support.

nodes.name: ftol3.asm
nodes.summary: i386 assembly float/double/integer conversion routines for CRT math support.

nodes.name: ftol3fast.asm
nodes.summary: i386 assembly float/double/integer conversion routines for CRT math support.

nodes.name: ftol3sat.asm
nodes.summary: i386 assembly float/double/integer conversion routines for CRT math support.

nodes.name: cfg_support.inc
nodes.summary: Control Flow Guard support inline functions: no-op check and enforcement detection.

nodes.name: mutex.cpp
nodes.summary: STL mutex implementation providing _Mtx_init/_Mtx_lock/_Mtx_unlock and related synchronization primitives for the C++ standard library.
nodes.languageNotes: MSVC STL mutex layer wrapping SRWLOCK for kernel-mode compatibility.

nodes.name: syserror_import_lib.cpp
nodes.summary: STL system error support: whitespace bitmap for error message trimming, and locale-aware system error message formatting.

nodes.name: xrngabort.cpp
nodes.summary: STL random number generator abort handler for debug diagnostics.

nodes.name: chandler_noexcept.cpp
nodes.summary: Noexcept exception handler wrappers that call terminate() on C++ exception during dispatch for __C_specific_handler and __GSHandlerCheck.

nodes.name: cpu_disp.c
nodes.summary: ISA availability detection: CPU feature probing via __cpuid and _xgetbv to set __isa_available and __isa_enabled globals.

nodes.name: default_precision.cpp
nodes.summary: Initializes x87 FPU control word to default precision for i386 compatibility.

nodes.name: dyn_tls_dtor.c
nodes.summary: Fallback definition of __dyn_tls_dtor_callback and accessor for TLS destructor callback.

nodes.name: ehassert.h
nodes.summary: Exception handling assertion macros: lightweight trace markers and assert wrapper.

nodes.name: ehhooks.h
nodes.summary: Exception handling hook declarations: thread-local unexpected handler and SE translator pointers.

nodes.name: initialization.cpp
nodes.summary: VCRuntime initialization and uninitialization: __vcrt_initialize, __vcrt_uninitialize, thread attach/detach handlers.
nodes.languageNotes: Platform-conditional init (ARM memcpy/ARM64 safe unaligned access) plus CRT lock/PTD management.

nodes.name: initializers.cpp
nodes.summary: CRT initializer table data (.CRT$XIA/.CRT$XCA/.CRT$XPA/.CRT$XTA) and linker default-lib directives.

nodes.name: jbcxrval.c
nodes.summary: Jump buffer and context record validation for exception handling, supporting both user and kernel mode stack limits.

nodes.name: sys_common.inl
nodes.summary: Driver entry point common implementation for Musa kernel modules: DriverMain and DllInitialize paths.
nodes.languageNotes: Included inline into multiple compilation units; implements __scrt_common_main_seh for kernel driver initialization via MusaCoreStartup.

nodes.name: sys_dllmain.cpp
nodes.summary: Kernel-mode DLL entry point using DllInitialize/DllUnload for driver attach/detach lifecycle.

nodes.name: sys_main.cpp
nodes.summary: Kernel-mode EXE entry point using DriverEntry that calls __scrt_common_main_seh with DriverMain.

nodes.name: thread_safe_statics.cpp
nodes.summary: Thread-safe static initialization helpers for local static variables with synchronization primitives.

nodes.name: tlsdtor.cpp
nodes.summary: Thread Local Storage destructor support for __declspec(thread) variables with dynamic tear-down.

nodes.name: tlsdyn.cpp
nodes.summary: Dynamic TLS initialization support handling __declspec(thread) variable init at process/thread attach.

nodes.name: undname.cxx
nodes.summary: MSVC C++ name demangling implementation with full Undecorator infrastructure for decorated symbol names.
nodes.languageNotes: Large file (5244 lines) implementing the UnDecorator class hierarchy with ~40 member functions for parsing all Microsoft name decoration categories.

nodes.name: undname.h
nodes.summary: Public header declaring the __UNDNAME_NAME API for undecorating C++ decorated names.

nodes.name: undname.hxx
nodes.summary: Internal header with DName, Replicator, and UnDecorator class declarations for the undname implementation.

nodes.name: undname.inl
nodes.summary: Inline implementation of UnDecorator member functions including intensive type parsing and template argument processing.

nodes.name: utf8.h
nodes.summary: UTF-8 encoding/decoding helper functions for undname string processing.

nodes.name: utility.cpp
nodes.summary: Common CRT startup and PE image utility functions including startup locks, atexit, and image validation.

nodes.name: guard_dispatch.asm
nodes.summary: x64 MSVC CRT runtime assembly for guard_dispatch.

nodes.name: guard_xfg_dispatch.asm
nodes.summary: x64 MSVC CRT runtime assembly for guard_xfg_dispatch.

nodes.name: notify.asm
nodes.summary: x64 MSVC CRT runtime assembly for notify.

nodes.name: guard_dispatch.asm
nodes.summary: ARM64 MSVC CRT runtime assembly for guard_dispatch.

nodes.name: handler.asm
nodes.summary: ARM64 MSVC CRT runtime assembly for handler.

nodes.name: notify.asm
nodes.summary: ARM64 MSVC CRT runtime assembly for notify.

nodes.name: exsup4.asm
nodes.summary: i386 MSVC CRT runtime assembly for exsup4.

nodes.name: ftol.asm
nodes.summary: i386 MSVC CRT runtime assembly for ftol.

nodes.name: ftol2.asm
nodes.summary: i386 MSVC CRT runtime assembly for ftol2.

nodes.name: ftol2fast.asm
nodes.summary: i386 MSVC CRT runtime assembly for ftol2fast.

nodes.name: ftol2sat.asm
nodes.summary: i386 MSVC CRT runtime assembly for ftol2sat.

nodes.name: ftol3.asm
nodes.summary: i386 MSVC CRT runtime assembly for ftol3.

nodes.name: ftol3fast.asm
nodes.summary: i386 MSVC CRT runtime assembly for ftol3fast.

nodes.name: ftol3sat.asm
nodes.summary: x86 assembly saturated float-to-long conversion helper for MSVC VCRT, used as floating-point overflow handler.
nodes.languageNotes: MASM assembly implementing ftol3 (float-to-long-long) saturated variant for x86.

nodes.name: cfg_support.inc
nodes.summary: Assembly include file providing CFG (Control Flow Guard) support macros for VCRT exception handling.

nodes.name: mutex.cpp
nodes.summary: Implementation of C++ standard mutex types including _Mtx_t, SRW lock wrappers, and timed lock operations for the MSVC STL.

nodes.name: syserror_import_lib.cpp
nodes.summary: STL import library for system error message formatting using locale-aware string trimming and FormatMessageA.

nodes.name: xrngabort.cpp
nodes.summary: STL random number generator abort handler that logs the failure via OutputDebugString and terminates.

nodes.name: chandler_noexcept.cpp
nodes.summary: Noexcept variant of C-specific exception handlers for VCRuntime, wrapping SEH handlers with terminate-on-dispatch behavior.

nodes.name: cpu_disp.c
nodes.summary: CPU feature detection and ISA availability initialization using cpuid, xgetbv, and processor feature queries.

nodes.name: default_precision.cpp
nodes.summary: Initializes the FPU to default 53-bit precision via _controlfp_s, or fast-fails on failure.

nodes.name: dyn_tls_dtor.c
nodes.summary: Dynamic TLS destructor stub for kernel-mode CRT initialization and cleanup.

nodes.name: ehassert.h
nodes.summary: Assertion macro definitions for VCRuntime exception handling code with debug reporting support.

nodes.name: ehhooks.h
nodes.summary: Header declaring VCRuntime exception handler hook types and function pointer declarations for custom EH filtering.

nodes.name: initialization.cpp
nodes.summary: VCRuntime initialization and uninitialization orchestration including ISA detection, string function init, PTD, and lock management.

nodes.name: initializers.cpp
nodes.summary: CRT initializer registration table (.CRT$XCA to .CRT$XCZ) for module constructor/destructor ordering.

nodes.name: jbcxrval.c
nodes.summary: Jump buffer validation for SEH __except blocks, verifying context records and stack pointer integrity with CFG guards.

nodes.name: sys_common.inl
nodes.summary: Common inline functions for kernel-mode CRT entry points including __scrt_common_main_seh with SEH wrapping for driver initialization.

nodes.name: sys_dllmain.cpp
nodes.summary: Kernel driver DLL main entry point wrapping DllInitialize/DllUnload with CRT initialization and MusaCore lifecycle.

nodes.name: sys_main.cpp
nodes.summary: Kernel driver main entry point (DriverEntry) delegating to __scrt_common_main_seh for CRT startup.

nodes.name: thread_safe_statics.cpp
nodes.summary: Thread-safe static local initialization with SRW lock, critical section fallback, and condition variable wait/notify machinery.

nodes.name: tlsdtor.cpp
nodes.summary: Dynamic TLS destructor registration and invocation, managing per-thread cleanup callback lists.

nodes.name: tlsdyn.cpp
nodes.summary: Dynamic TLS initialization and on-demand TLS index resolution for CRT and COM module support.

nodes.name: undname.cxx
nodes.summary: MSVC C++ name undecoration (__unDName) implementation, decompiling decorated/linkage names back to human-readable C++ signatures.
nodes.languageNotes: 5465-line implementation of the MSVC __unDName demangler supporting MSVC mangling schemes through VS 2022.

nodes.name: undname.h
nodes.summary: Header declaring public undname API prototypes for __unDName and __unDNameEx.

nodes.name: undname.hxx
nodes.summary: Internal header with undname class declarations, operator tables, and encoding lookup tables for MSVC name mangling.

nodes.name: undname.inl
nodes.summary: Inline implementation of undname string encoding lookup tables, operator tables, and helper functions for the demangler.

nodes.name: utf8.h
nodes.summary: UTF-8 encoding/decoding utility header with character classification and conversion macros for the demangler.

nodes.name: RunTests
nodes.summary: Main test routine executing 1600+ lines of CRT/STL functional tests covering heap allocation, string functions, locale, math, file I/O, wchar, and container operations.

nodes.name: TestThreadRoutine
nodes.summary: System thread entry point that expands the kernel stack and calls RunTests, then terminates the thread.

nodes.name: DriverUnload
nodes.summary: Driver unload handler that waits for the test thread to complete and closes the thread handle.

nodes.name: DriverMain
nodes.summary: Driver entry point that logs initialization, creates a system thread to run tests, and returns NTSTATUS.

nodes.name: operator delete
nodes.summary: Kernel-mode sized operator delete that releases memory via kfree with the given pool type and tag.

nodes.name: operator delete[]
nodes.summary: Kernel-mode array operator delete that delegates to the scalar operator delete.

nodes.name: ExReallocatePoolWithTag
nodes.summary: Internal helper that allocates a new pool block, copies old data, and frees the old block; acts as the kernel-mode realloc primitive.

nodes.name: kmalloc
nodes.summary: Kernel-mode malloc that allocates pool memory via ExAllocatePoolWithTag with new-handler retry on failure.

nodes.name: kcalloc
nodes.summary: Kernel-mode calloc that allocates zero-initialized pool memory with overflow checking and new-handler retry.

nodes.name: krealloc
nodes.summary: Kernel-mode realloc that reallocates pool memory using ExReallocatePoolWithTag with null/new-size-zero edge cases and new-handler retry.

nodes.name: krecalloc
nodes.summary: Kernel-mode recalloc that reallocates and zero-fills newly expanded memory regions.

nodes.name: operator new
nodes.summary: Kernel-mode operator new that allocates via kmalloc with new-handler retry and throws bad_alloc on failure.

nodes.name: kallocator
nodes.summary: STL-compatible kernel-mode allocator template parameterized by pool type and tag, providing allocate/deallocate/construct/destroy/max_size with STL rebind support.

nodes.name: kallocator<void>
nodes.summary: Partial specialization of kallocator for void type, defining value_type, pointer types, and rebind support.

nodes.name: thread_local_t
nodes.summary: Kernel-mode thread-local storage wrapper using TlsAlloc/TlsGetValue/TlsSetValue/TlsFree with RAII semantics and operator overloads for transparent T access.

nodes.name: __C_ExecuteExceptionFilter
nodes.summary: Invokes an exception filter function with nonvolatile register context restoration on ARM64.

nodes.name: __C_ExecuteTerminationHandler
nodes.summary: Invokes a termination handler function with nonvolatile register context on ARM64.

nodes.name: _NLG_Notify
nodes.summary: Records NLG notification data on the stack for exception handling debugging.

nodes.name: __NLG_Dispatch2
nodes.summary: Completes NLG dispatch by freeing stack allocation and returning.

nodes.name: __NLG_Return2
nodes.summary: NLG return stub that returns to the caller.

nodes.name: _EH4_GlobalUnwind2
nodes.summary: Initiates global unwind for EH4 exception handling via RtlUnwind on i386.

nodes.name: _ftol
nodes.summary: Converts x87 FPU top-of-stack to a signed 32-bit integer using chop rounding mode.

nodes.name: _ftol2_sse_excpt
nodes.summary: SSE ftol conversion with exception handling, used for _ftol2 variant.

nodes.name: _ftol2_sse
nodes.summary: SSE ftol conversion entry point for standard float-to-int.

nodes.name: _ftoi2
nodes.summary: Converts float/double to signed 32-bit integer via SSE.

nodes.name: _ftoui2
nodes.summary: Converts float/double to unsigned 32-bit integer with saturation.

nodes.name: _ftol2
nodes.summary: Converts double to signed long using SSE truncation.

nodes.name: _ftoul2
nodes.summary: Converts double to unsigned long using SSE truncation.

nodes.name: _ftoul2_legacy
nodes.summary: Legacy float-to-unsigned-long conversion for binary compatibility.

nodes.name: _ftoi2_fast
nodes.summary: Fast float/double to signed 32-bit integer conversion via SSE.

nodes.name: _ftoui2_fast
nodes.summary: Fast float/double to unsigned 32-bit integer conversion via SSE.

nodes.name: _ftol2_fast
nodes.summary: Fast double to signed long conversion using SSE truncation.

nodes.name: _ftoul2_fast
nodes.summary: Fast double to unsigned long conversion using SSE truncation.

nodes.name: _ftoi2_sat
nodes.summary: Saturating float/double to signed 32-bit integer conversion.

nodes.name: _ftoui2_sat
nodes.summary: Saturating float/double to unsigned 32-bit integer conversion.

nodes.name: _ftol2_sat
nodes.summary: Saturating double to signed long conversion.

nodes.name: _ftoul2_sat
nodes.summary: Saturating double to unsigned long conversion.

nodes.name: _ftol3
nodes.summary: Float/double to signed long conversion (3-operand SSE).

nodes.name: _dtol3
nodes.summary: Double to signed long conversion (3-operand SSE).

nodes.name: _ultod3
nodes.summary: Unsigned long to double conversion (3-operand SSE).

nodes.name: _ltod3
nodes.summary: Signed long to double conversion (3-operand SSE).

nodes.name: _ultof3
nodes.summary: Unsigned long to float conversion (3-operand SSE).

nodes.name: _ltof3
nodes.summary: Signed long to float conversion (3-operand SSE).

nodes.name: _guard_check_icall_nop
nodes.summary: No-op CFG check function invoked when guard ICall is not enforced.

nodes.name: _guard_icall_checks_enforced
nodes.summary: Determines whether CFG enforcement is active by comparing the check function pointer.

nodes.name: _Thrd_abort
nodes.summary: Aborts the program with a diagnostic message on precondition failure.

nodes.name: _Mtx_init_in_situ
nodes.summary: Initializes a mutex in-place without allocation.

nodes.name: _Mtx_destroy_in_situ
nodes.summary: Destroys a mutex in-place, asserting it is not busy.

nodes.name: _Mtx_init
nodes.summary: Allocates and initializes a new mutex.

nodes.name: _Mtx_destroy
nodes.summary: Destroys and frees a dynamically allocated mutex.

nodes.name: mtx_do_lock
nodes.summary: Core mutex locking logic supporting plain, recursive, try, and timed modes.

nodes.name: _Mtx_unlock
nodes.summary: Unlocks a mutex and releases the SRW lock when count reaches zero.

nodes.name: _Mtx_lock
nodes.summary: Locks a mutex with infinite timeout.

nodes.name: _Mtx_trylock
nodes.summary: Attempts to lock a mutex without blocking.

nodes.name: _Mtx_timedlock
nodes.summary: Attempts to lock a mutex with a timeout.

nodes.name: _Mtx_current_owns
nodes.summary: Tests whether the current thread owns the mutex.

nodes.name: _Mtx_getconcrtcs
nodes.summary: Returns the internal critical section pointer for binary compatibility.

nodes.name: _Whitespace_bitmap_t
nodes.summary: Compile-time whitespace classification bitmap used to detect trailing whitespace in system error messages.

nodes.name: __std_system_error_allocate_message
nodes.summary: Allocates and formats a system error message string using GetLocaleInfoEx and FormatMessageA.

nodes.name: __std_system_error_deallocate_message
nodes.summary: Deallocates a system error message string via LocalFree.

nodes.name: __std_get_string_size_without_trailing_whitespace
nodes.summary: Computes string length excluding trailing whitespace using the bitmap.

nodes.name: _Rng_abort
nodes.summary: Outputs a random generator abort message to debug output.

nodes.name: __C_specific_handler_noexcept
nodes.summary: Wraps __C_specific_handler to call terminate() on dispatched C++ exceptions.

nodes.name: _except_handler4_noexcept
nodes.summary: x86-specific noexcept wrapper for _except_handler4 calling terminate() on C++ exceptions during dispatch.

nodes.name: __GSHandlerCheck_SEH_noexcept
nodes.summary: Wraps __GSHandlerCheck_SEH to call terminate() on stack buffer overrun during dispatch.

nodes.name: __GSHandlerCheck_noexcept
nodes.summary: x86-specific noexcept wrapper for __GSHandlerCheck calling terminate() on stack buffer overrun.

nodes.name: __isa_available_init
nodes.summary: Detects available CPU ISA features (SSE2/SSE42/AVX/AVX2/AVX512) using cpuid and xgetbv, sets __isa_available/__isa_enabled/__favor globals.

nodes.name: _initialize_default_precision
nodes.summary: Sets x87 FPU control word to default precision, fast-fails on error.

nodes.name: __scrt_get_dyn_tls_dtor_callback
nodes.summary: Returns a pointer to the dynamic TLS destructor callback.

nodes.name: init_string_functions
nodes.summary: Sets memcpy function pointers for ARM or safe unaligned access flag for ARM64.

nodes.name: __IsWindowsVersionOrGreaterEx
nodes.summary: Windows version check helper using VerifyVersionInfoW for build number comparison.

nodes.name: __IsWindows1122H2OrGreater
nodes.summary: Checks if running on Windows 11 22H2 or later (build >= 22621).

nodes.name: __vcrt_initialize
nodes.summary: Main VCRuntime initializer: ISA detection, locks, and per-thread data setup.

nodes.name: __vcrt_uninitialize
nodes.summary: VCRuntime uninitializer: cleans up per-thread data and locks.

nodes.name: __vcrt_uninitialize_critical
nodes.summary: Critical uninitialization: cleans up per-thread data only.

nodes.name: __vcrt_thread_attach
nodes.summary: Per-thread attach handler: creates per-thread data structure.

nodes.name: __vcrt_thread_detach
nodes.summary: Per-thread detach handler: frees per-thread data structure.

nodes.name: __except_validate_context_record
nodes.summary: Validates a context record stack pointer against TEB stack limits, fast-fails on invalid context.

nodes.name: __except_validate_jump_buffer_common
nodes.summary: Shared jump buffer validation logic checking stack extents via a provided SP routine.

nodes.name: __except_get_jumpbuf_sp
nodes.summary: Extracts stack pointer from a jump buffer structure.

nodes.name: __except_validate_jump_buffer
nodes.summary: Public entry point for jump buffer validation.

nodes.name: __scrt_common_exit
nodes.summary: Driver unload handler: calls driver unload, C cleanup, CRT uninit, and MusaCoreShutdown.

nodes.name: __scrt_common_main_seh
nodes.summary: Core driver entry point: TLS init, CRT init, C/C++ initializers, TLS callbacks, and driver main invocation.

nodes.name: DllInitialize
nodes.summary: Driver DLL attach entry point that calls __scrt_common_main_seh and routes to DriverMainForDllAttach.

nodes.name: DllUnload
nodes.summary: Driver DLL detach handler that calls DriverMainForDllDetach, _cexit, __scrt_uninitialize_crt, and MusaCoreShutdown.

nodes.name: DriverEntry
nodes.summary: Driver entry point that delegates to __scrt_common_main_seh with DriverMain callback.

nodes.name: __scrt_initialize_thread_safe_statics_platform_specific
nodes.summary: Initializes platform-specific synchronization primitives (SRW lock or critical section + event) for thread-safe statics.

nodes.name: __scrt_uninitialize_thread_safe_statics
nodes.summary: Cleans up synchronization primitives used by thread-safe static initialization.

nodes.name: __scrt_initialize_thread_safe_statics
nodes.summary: Initializes thread-safe static support including atexit tables and platform-specific init.

nodes.name: _Init_thread_lock
nodes.summary: Acquires the thread-safe statics lock (SRW exclusive or critical section).

nodes.name: _Init_thread_unlock
nodes.summary: Releases the thread-safe statics lock (SRW exclusive or critical section).

nodes.name: _Init_thread_wait_v2
nodes.summary: Waits on the condition variable or event for the initializing thread to complete.

nodes.name: _Init_thread_notify
nodes.summary: Signals waiting threads that initialization is complete via condition variable or event.

nodes.name: _Init_thread_header
nodes.summary: Controls access to initialization expression; only one thread proceeds to initialize.

nodes.name: _Init_thread_abort
nodes.summary: Resets initialization state to uninitialized and releases waiting threads on exception.

nodes.name: _Init_thread_footer
nodes.summary: Marks variable as initialized, increments epoch counters, and releases waiting threads.

nodes.name: __tlregdtor
nodes.summary: Registers a destructor callback for __declspec(thread) variables, called by compiler-generated initializers.

nodes.name: __dyn_tls_dtor
nodes.summary: Walks the registered TLS destructor list on DLL_THREAD_DETACH or DLL_PROCESS_DETACH and calls each callback.

nodes.name: __dyn_tls_init
nodes.summary: Initializes dynamic TLS callbacks by calling registered initializer function pointers on process/thread attach.

nodes.name: __dyn_tls_on_demand_init
nodes.summary: Wrapper that invokes __dyn_tls_init for on-demand TLS initialization.

nodes.name: __safe_get_tls_index
nodes.summary: Safely retrieves the TLS index for the current module, triggering on-demand init if needed.

nodes.name: _HeapManager
nodes.summary: Custom heap manager with linked-list allocation, Constructor and Destructor for managing undname memory.

nodes.name: StringLiteral
nodes.summary: Literal string wrapper with operator+ for building demangled name strings.

nodes.name: DName
nodes.summary: Demangled name node with status flags (isPtrRef, isUDC, isArray, isNoTE, isPinPtr, etc.) and string operators.

nodes.name: Replicator
nodes.summary: Replicator for tracked name buffer operations with bracket indexing and full-check.

nodes.name: UnDecorator
nodes.summary: Main undecorator class with full name parsing, type encoding, template support, and calling convention handling.

nodes.name: __UNDNAME_NAME
nodes.summary: Public entry point for undecoration: allocates heap manager and calls __UNDNAME_NAME_EX.

nodes.name: __UNDNAME_NAME_EX
nodes.summary: Extended undecoration entry point with locking and initialization of UnDecorator state.

nodes.name: UnDecorator::UnDecorator
nodes.summary: Constructor for UnDecorator, initializes parsing state from decorated name string.

nodes.name: UnDecorator::parseDecoratedName
nodes.summary: Parses the decorated name by dispatching to getDecoratedName or getTemplateName based on the name format.

nodes.name: UnDecorator::getUndecoratedName
nodes.summary: Generates the undecorated name string from parsed state, handling status flags and length limits.

nodes.name: UnDecorator::getCHPEName
nodes.summary: Generates CHPE (x86-on-ARM64) compatible undecorated name with memory copy operations.

nodes.name: UnDecorator::getDecoratedName
nodes.summary: Core decorated name analysis: processes type, scope, template params, and returns DNameNode representation.

nodes.name: UnDecorator::getSymbolName
nodes.summary: Parses a symbol name component, checking for template names and operator names.

nodes.name: UnDecorator::getZName
nodes.summary: Parses a Z-encoded name (compressed namespace/identifier) with Replicator for back-references.

nodes.name: UnDecorator::getOperatorName
nodes.summary: Parses operator name encoding including all overloadable operators, conversions, and allocations.

nodes.name: UnDecorator::getStringEncoding
nodes.summary: Parses string encoding modifiers (char/wchar_t/char16_t/char32_t with length and null-termination).

nodes.name: UnDecorator::getScope
nodes.summary: Parses nested scope (namespace/class) hierarchy from decorated name with full qualification.

nodes.name: UnDecorator::getDimension
nodes.summary: Parses array dimension from decorated name with signed/unsigned variants.

nodes.name: UnDecorator::getValue
nodes.summary: Parses a numeric value from the decorated name buffer.

nodes.name: UnDecorator::getFloatingPoint
nodes.summary: Parses floating-point literal encoding from decorated name.

nodes.name: UnDecorator::getValueObject
nodes.summary: Parses value-type template arguments including nested template instantiations.

nodes.name: UnDecorator::getArrayObject
nodes.summary: Parses array-type template arguments from decorated name.

nodes.name: UnDecorator::getStringObject
nodes.summary: Parses string-literal template arguments from decorated name.

nodes.name: UnDecorator::composeDeclaration
nodes.summary: Composes the full C++ declaration string from parsed type encoding.

nodes.name: UnDecorator::getTypeEncoding
nodes.summary: Parses the complete type encoding from decorated name, dispatching to sub-parsers.

nodes.name: UnDecorator::getBasicDataType
nodes.summary: Parses basic data type encoding including primitive types, pointers, and references.

nodes.name: UnDecorator::getPtrRefType
nodes.summary: Parses pointer/reference type encoding with cv-qualifiers.

nodes.name: UnDecorator::getDataIndirectType
nodes.summary: Parses indirect data type encoding for pointers, references, and pointers-to-members.

nodes.name: UnDecorator::getPtrRefDataType
nodes.summary: Parses pointer-to-data type encoding with cv qualifiers.

nodes.name: UnDecorator::unDNameGenerateCHPE
nodes.summary: Generates undecorated name for CHPE (Hybrid x86/ARM64) with custom heap manager.

nodes.name: is_potentially_valid_image_base
nodes.summary: Tests whether a memory address points to a valid loaded PE image by checking DOS/NT signatures.

nodes.name: find_pe_section
nodes.summary: Finds a PE section by RVA through the section headers.

nodes.name: __scrt_is_nonwritable_in_current_image
nodes.summary: Determines if a given address range falls within a non-writable PE section.

nodes.name: __scrt_acquire_startup_lock
nodes.summary: Acquires the CRT startup synchronization lock using interlocked compare-exchange.

nodes.name: __scrt_release_startup_lock
nodes.summary: Releases the CRT startup synchronization lock using interlocked exchange.

nodes.name: __scrt_initialize_crt
nodes.summary: Initializes the CRT including ISA dispatch and UCRT/VCRT initialization.

nodes.name: __scrt_uninitialize_crt
nodes.summary: Uninitializes the CRT by cleaning up UCRT and VCRT state.

nodes.name: _onexit
nodes.summary: Registers a function to be called at exit, calling _crt_atexit or _register_onexit_function.

nodes.name: atexit
nodes.summary: Standard atexit wrapper that delegates to _onexit.

nodes.name: at_quick_exit
nodes.summary: Registers a function for quick_exit notification.

nodes.name: __scrt_fastfail
nodes.summary: Invokes __fastfail for immediate process termination on fatal CRT errors.

nodes.name: vcwinternls.h
nodes.summary: Minimal header (6 lines) including internal locale declarations for VCRT.

nodes.name: _guard_dispatch_icall_nop
nodes.summary: x64 CFG dispatch no-op: jumps to RAX target without guard check.

nodes.name: _guard_xfg_dispatch_icall_nop
nodes.summary: x64 XFG dispatch no-op: jumps to __guard_dispatch_icall_fptr.

nodes.name: _NLG_Notify
nodes.summary: x64 non-local goto notification: stores parameters and dispatches to __NLG_Dispatch2.

nodes.name: __NLG_Dispatch2
nodes.summary: x64 NLG dispatch continuation: returns after notification.

nodes.name: __NLG_Return2
nodes.summary: x64 NLG return stub: returns void pointer to caller.

nodes.name: _guard_dispatch_icall_nop
nodes.summary: ARM64 CFG dispatch no-op: branches to X9 target without guard check.

nodes.name: __C_ExecuteExceptionFilter
nodes.summary: ARM64 exception filter execution helper: saves non-volatile registers and calls filter.

nodes.name: __C_ExecuteTerminationHandler
nodes.summary: ARM64 termination handler execution helper: saves registers and calls handler.

nodes.name: _NLG_Notify
nodes.summary: ARM64 non-local goto notification: stores parameters and dispatches to __NLG_Dispatch2.

nodes.name: __NLG_Dispatch2
nodes.summary: ARM64 NLG dispatch continuation: frees stack and returns.

nodes.name: __NLG_Return2
nodes.summary: ARM64 NLG return stub: returns void pointer.

nodes.name: _EH4_GlobalUnwind2
nodes.summary: i386 EH4 global unwind helper: calls RtlUnwind with return point.

nodes.name: _ftol
nodes.summary: i386 float-to-long conversion: truncates TOS to 32-bit integer via fistp.

nodes.name: _ftol2_sse_excpt
nodes.summary: i386 SSE float-to-long helper with exception support: jumps to _ftoi2.

nodes.name: _ftol2_sse
nodes.summary: i386 SSE float-to-long helper: jumps to _ftoi2.

nodes.name: _ftoi2
nodes.summary: i386 SSE float-to-int conversion with SSE42 and legacy paths.

nodes.name: _ftoui2
nodes.summary: i386 SSE float-to-unsigned-int conversion with SSE42 and legacy paths.

nodes.name: _ftol2
nodes.summary: i386 SSE float-to-long conversion with SSE42 fisttp and fallback.

nodes.name: _ftoul2
nodes.summary: i386 SSE float-to-unsigned-long conversion with SSE42 and legacy handling.

nodes.name: _ftoi2_fast
nodes.summary: i386 fast float-to-int conversion via SSE42 fisttp.

nodes.name: _ftol2_fast
nodes.summary: i386 fast float-to-long conversion via SSE42 fisttp.

nodes.name: _ftoi2_sat
nodes.summary: i386 saturated float-to-int conversion with NaN/overflow handling.

nodes.name: _ftoui2_sat
nodes.summary: i386 saturated float-to-unsigned-int conversion with overflow clamping.

nodes.name: _ftol2_sat
nodes.summary: i386 saturated float-to-long conversion with saturation on overflow.

nodes.name: _ftoui3
nodes.summary: i386 AVX512 float-to-unsigned-int conversion via vcvttss2usi.

nodes.name: _dtoui3
nodes.summary: i386 AVX512 double-to-unsigned-int conversion via vcvttsd2usi.

nodes.name: _ultod3
nodes.summary: i386 AVX512 unsigned-long-to-double conversion via vmovd.

nodes.name: _Whitespace_bitmap_t
nodes.summary: Bitmap-based whitespace detection class used to trim trailing whitespace from system error messages.

nodes.name: _Rng_abort
nodes.summary: Abort handler for random number generator failures, logging the message and calling abort.

nodes.name: _HeapManager
nodes.summary: Custom heap allocator for name undecoration, managing fixed-size blocks with freelist for allocation-free operation during demangling.

nodes.name: DName
nodes.summary: Decorated name string container with status flags for type qualifiers (pointer/ref, UDC, array, noexcept, vcall thunk, COM array, pin-ptr) and concatenation operators.

nodes.name: Replicator
nodes.summary: Template argument replicator tracking repeated template parameter references during name undecoration.

nodes.name: UnDecorator
nodes.summary: Core name undecoration engine with methods for parsing all MSVC mangling constructs including scope, templates, types, calling conventions, and extended data types.

nodes.name: unDNameGenerateCHPE
nodes.summary: Generates CHPE (Hybrid x86/ARM) undecorated name output from a decorated name string.

nodes.name: __UNDNAME_NAME
nodes.summary: Public entry point for __unDName, validating parameters and delegating to __UNDNAME_NAME_EX.

nodes.name: __UNDNAME_NAME_EX
nodes.summary: Extended __unDName entry point with parameter callback and thread-safe locking around the undecoration engine.

nodes.name: warning
nodes.summary: Internal warning handler emitting diagnostic messages during malformed name parsing.

layers.name: Overlay Core
layers.description: Kernel-mode extension layer — unique Musa.Runtime additions (kext allocator, thread-local storage, kernel NT headers) that do not exist in stock MSVC CRT

layers.name: Overlay Runtime
layers.description: Musa.Runtime-adapted MSVC CRT and UCRT source files that replace corresponding base SDK files for kernel-mode operation

layers.name: Base SDK Reference
layers.description: Unmodified Microsoft.VisualC.Runtime source tree — the stock MSVC CRT (14.44, 14.51) and UCRT (10.0.26100, 10.0.28000) that the overlay patches replace

layers.name: Build & Infrastructure
layers.description: MSBuild project files, CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions), NuGet packaging, build scripts, and environment setup for kernel-mode compilation

layers.name: Test Driver
layers.description: Kernel-mode driver test harness that validates Musa.Runtime functionality with 26+ unit tests covering heap, locale, printf, ctype, and CRT initialization

layers.name: Documentation
layers.description: Project docs, architecture guides, diff reports, localization plans, license agreements, and GitHub issue templates

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: Start with README.md to understand Musa.Runtime's core mission: giving Windows kernel-mode developers the same C++ experience as application developers. The project ports the Microsoft MSVC runtime (CRT, UCRT, VCRT, STL) to kernel mode using a Docker-inspired overlay mechanism that selectively replaces SDK source files with kernel-safe equivalents.

tour.title: Architecture Guide
tour.description: The ARCHITECTURE document explains the overlay system at a conceptual level — how source files from the official MSVC SDK are selectively patched via a 'kext' (kernel extension) overlay directory. Files in the overlay shadow their SDK counterparts at compile time, turning user-mode syscalls into kernel-mode NT API calls without forking the entire SDK.

tour.title: Build System Overview
tour.description: BUILD-SYSTEM.md documents the multi-project MSBuild architecture: Musa.Runtime.vcxproj acts as the top-level aggregator that delegates to CRT, UCRT, VCRT, and STL sub-projects. The build requires Visual Studio, Windows Driver Kit, and the Musa.Core NuGet package. Build scripts like BuildAllTargets.cmd and InitializeVisualStudioEnvironment.cmd automate environment setup and multi-architecture builds.

tour.title: Solution Entry Point
tour.description: Musa.Runtime.slnx and Musa.Runtime.vcxproj are the top-level entry points. The solution references the test driver project; the vcxproj aggregates the four sub-projects (CRT, UCRT, VCRT, STL), each targeting its own library. Directory.Build.props and Directory.Packages.Cpp.props establish shared MSBuild properties, C++ toolchain settings, and NuGet package versions across the entire solution.

tour.title: CRT Initialization in Kernel Mode
tour.description: universal.h and universal.cpp form the kernel-mode CRT initialization layer. universal.h defines the precompiled header that pulls in kernel-safe CRT headers, while universal.cpp implements the entry point bootstrap — replacing the user-mode _CRT_INIT with kernel-safe equivalents that manage global state initialization without relying on user-mode loader structures.

tour.title: Kernel Memory Allocation Backend
tour.description: The kmalloc/kfree subsystem replaces the user-mode heap with the Windows kernel pool allocator (ExAllocatePool2/ExFreePoolWithTag). kmalloc.h declares the API surface, kmalloc.cpp implements allocation functions including aligned and zeroed variants, and kfree.cpp wraps pool deallocation. This is the foundation all other kernel-mode memory operations depend on.

tour.title: STL-Compatible Kernel Allocator
tour.description: kallocator.h provides a C++ standard allocator template (kallocator<T, PoolType, Tag>) parameterized by pool type and allocation tag, enabling std::vector, std::list, and other STL containers to safely allocate from kernel paged or non-paged pool. knew.h and new_km.cpp implement operator new/delete overloads that dispatch through the kmalloc backend, while delete_km.cpp adds the aligned and sized deallocation overloads required by modern C++.

tour.title: Kernel Thread-Local Storage
tour.description: thread_local.h provides a kernel-mode thread_local_storage wrapper template that uses TlsAlloc/TlsGetValue/TlsSetValue/TlsFree to emulate the C++ thread_local keyword. This is critical for CRT functions like errno, locale state, and strtok-style per-thread parsers that depend on thread-local data in user mode but have no native equivalent in the kernel.

tour.title: UCRT Subsystem
tour.description: The UCRT (Universal C Runtime) vcxproj is the largest project in the solution, containing over 300 source files from the SDK covering stdio, string operations, math, locale, time, and process management. Musa.Runtime.props customizes the C++ build configuration for kernel mode — disabling user-mode features like console I/O and DLL loader references while adding kernel-mode compiler flags.

tour.title: STL and Math Support
tour.description: The STL vcxproj builds the C++ Standard Library for kernel mode. Its files filter organizes source into logical folders (algorithm, containers, iterators, locale, numeric, random, regex, strings, utilities). The math subsystem uses the Boost.Math dependency (configured in Musa.Runtime.Config.props) and is governed by an exclusion list that removes functions requiring user-mode FPU state.

tour.title: CRT and VCRT Backend
tour.description: The CRT vcxproj compiles the C runtime infrastructure — floating-point helper functions (ftol2, ftol3 in assembly), secure CRT implementations, GS (buffer security) check handlers, and exception-handling prologues for x86, x64, ARM, and ARM64. The VCRT vcxproj handles the Visual C++ runtime with initterm, thread-safe statics, VCRuntime exception helpers, and environment variable management.

tour.title: Overlay Changes Report
tour.description: OVERLAY-DIFF-REPORT.md catalogs every SDK file that was modified by the overlay — the specific changes needed to make each CRT/STL function work in kernel mode. LOCALE_OVERLAY_PLAN.md details the locale subsystem port: replacing _locale_t with kernel-safe structures, patching setlocale and localeconv, and the six BSODs that were resolved in the heap, printf recursion, locale NULL, lconv NULL, lowio init, and stdio initializer.

tour.title: Testing and Validation
tour.description: DEVELOPER-GUIDE.md provides instructions for building and testing the kernel-mode runtime. The TestForDriver project is a WDM driver containing 1600+ lines of comprehensive CRT/STL tests covering locale, printf formatting, string functions, math operations, and memory allocation. It validates that the overlay port produces correct results when running in kernel address space.

tour.title: Packaging and CI/CD
tour.description: The CI pipeline builds the project across x64, x86, ARM, and ARM64 architectures using a single workflow that installs prerequisites, runs the build, and packages the output. A PowerShell script patches the WDK targets to enable x86 and ARM. The NuGet package manifest defines the published artifact layout: static libraries, kernel-mode headers (kallocator, knew, kmalloc, thread_local), and MSBuild integration props/targets for downstream kernel driver projects.
